---
title: "Séminaire des étudiants de la Chaire CARA"
subtitle: |
  | Bonus-Malus Scale Premiums For Tweedies’ Compound Poisson Model
  | Raissa Coulibaly, UQAM 
date: 2023-09-21
image: ../../img/RaissaC.png
toc: TRUE
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}

:::


::: {.column width="2%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](../../img/RaissaC.png)
:::

::: {.column width="3%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::

::::
